title: RBI Monetary Penalties on City Union Bank Limited, Newa Investments Private Limited, and Mintifi Finserve Private Limited
description: <cite index="24-1,24-2">The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) imposed monetary penalties on City Union Bank Limited, Newa Investments Private Limited, and Mintifi Finserve Private Limited for separate compliance failures. City Union Bank was fined ₹10.10 lakh for non-compliance with RBI directions on priority sector loan accounts and reporting obligations relating to Self Help Group (SHG) members.</cite> <cite index="24-5,24-6">RBI imposed a ₹2.70 lakh penalty on Newa Investments Private Limited for non-compliance with governance directions, finding that the company had not taken prior written permission from RBI before appointing directors.</cite> <cite index="24-13,24-14">RBI levied a ₹3.10 lakh penalty on NBFC Mintifi Finserve Private Limited for non-compliance with Know Your Customer (KYC) directions, as the company did not upload KYC records of certain customers to the Central KYC Records Registry within the prescribed timeline.</cite>
